title: Chirp Client
description:
An overhaul of my other packs, uses sodium :D

(PVP And Optimization, its good i promisee)
body:
Chirp is a modpack I put together mainly for PvP, but also to make Minecraft run way smoother. It’s got a bunch of optimization stuff baked in — Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, all that — plus some tweaks that make fighting feel cleaner and more responsive.

I tried to keep it lightweight and snappy, so it boots fast and doesn’t choke on big servers or shaders. There’s also a bunch of little QoL things like HUDs, zoom, account switching, and durability indicators — nothing too flashy, just stuff that makes the game easier to play.

I use this myself, so its certianly not neglected, and i will (hopefully) maintain for future updates.

If you run into issues or have ideas for stuff to add, feel free to reach out (dc-WolfJTA). Always happy to hear feedback or help troubleshoot. Hope it works well for you.
